texts.text: Accommodation, Breakfast, High Tea (16h00), Lunch and Dinner daily.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: ** All guest on Half Board and Full Board packages are entitled to 1 a la carte dinner in Zanzibar Restaurant, Spice Route and Barharini Restaurant in their stay.
texts.text: ** All guest on Half Board and Full Board packages are entitled to 1 a la carte dinner in Zanzibar Restaurant, Spice Route and Barharini Restaurant in their stay.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: ** Additional (a la carte) dinners will be charged the applicable a la carte menu price.
texts.text: ** Additional (a la carte) dinners will be charged the applicable a la carte menu price.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 4 to 12 years sharing with adults in superior or executive suite HB pays $50 per child per night 4 to 12 years sharing with adults in superior or executive suite FB pays $65 per child per night Children sharing in their own room pays 85% of the adult room rate per night
texts.text: 4 to 12 years sharing with adults in superior or executive suite HB pays $50 per child per night 4 to 12 years sharing with adults in superior or executive suite FB pays $65 per child per night Children sharing in their own room pays 85% of the adult room rate per night
